title: Pensions schemes newsletter 174 — October 2025
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC’s Pension Schemes Services to update stakeholders on the latest news for pension schemes. Pension schemes newsletter 174 has articles on:    winding up a scheme and Pension Scheme Return UK resident pension scheme administrators qualifying recognised overseas pension schemes returning tax free lump sums  pension flexibility statistics registration statistics applications to register new pension schemes  "
